title: FBI Composite Sketch - Ellipsoid Bronze Object
summary: FBI composite drawing of a bronze metallic ellipsoid object reported at 130-195 feet in length. Witness-derived; no sensor corroboration in the released packet.

audience.tldr: FBI investigative document based on a witness reconstruction depicting a UAP encounter.
what_we_know: Photographic capture preserved in the original release.
Released as part of the PURSUE disclosure batch on May 8, 2026.
what_we_dont: Exact date of the encounter is not specified in the released file.
Specific geographic coordinates are not disclosed.
No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation (drone, balloon, atmospheric, sensor artifact) plausibly fits the description.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 33/100. Top drivers: witness credibility (civilian_credentialed), official disposition (unresolved_no_review).
